summary: Ministers should end Palantir’s contract before medical confidentiality is sacrificed to Silicon Valley’s appetite for public dataAlarm bells ought to have rung when it emerged last month that Palantir engineers could gain “unlimited access” to identifiable NHS patient data. title: Presentation: Architecting a Centralized Platform for Data Deletion at Netflix
summary: The speakers discuss the architectural challenges of executing safe data deletion across distributed datastores. Balancing durability, availability &  correctness, they explain how to orchestrate multi-system deletion propagation without impacting live traffic. They share lessons on controlling tombstone accumulation, building continuous audit loops, and gaining trust with a centralized platform. By Vidhya Arvind, Shawn Liu
